overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring the Badlands outskirts. The character walks through a desert canyon settlement with makeshift buildings built into red rock walls, passing under concrete overpasses and ascending hills with views of the distant Night City skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under concrete overpass with utility infrastructure

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the left side of the street
character turns left and begins ascending the hillside sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk under overpass, observing street traffic, then turning to ascend the hill

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sedan driving along the street
person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with red structural support beams
wooden utility poles with dense network of overhead power lines
red and white street sign reading 'Woodland' mounted on weathered wall
tall weathered concrete wall with green metal railing on top
hazy silhouette of futuristic skyscrapers visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view walking under a massive concrete overpass in a desert-edge settlement. The character moves along a sidewalk next to a retaining wall, passing a 'Woodland' street sign. A futuristic car drives past on the left as the character turns left and begins ascending a hillside path, with the distant city skyline visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside residential street built into red rock canyon wall

events.description: exits the covered area under the overpass into open sunlit hillside
continues steep ascent along the canyon road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along the canyon road, passing makeshift structures built into the rock face

notable_agents.action: resident walking down the hill toward the camera

entered.detail: steep reddish-orange rock face with makeshift buildings and stairs built into it
wooden and metal staircases climbing up the canyon wall to elevated shacks
black metal crowd control barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
two-story blue and white building with graffiti on the upper level

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into bright sunlight, ascending a steep sidewalk alongside a dramatic red rock canyon wall. Makeshift wooden structures and stairs cling to the cliff face on the left. Metal barriers line the right side of the path. A blue apartment building with graffiti becomes visible ahead as the character continues climbing.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential cluster at canyon wall with graffiti-covered buildings

events.description: slows approach to the blue building and looks around
turns around and begins descending back toward the street

agents.ego_description: approaching the blue building to observe the graffiti and surroundings, then turning to head back down

notable_agents.action: group of residents standing and conversing near the blue building entrance
person in yellow pants walking past the camera

entered.detail: wall covered in red and purple graffiti including text and a large hand symbol
black utility van with orange stripes parked on the dirt
industrial building with corrugated metal walls and roll-up garage door

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the hill at a blue apartment building covered in colorful graffiti. Several NPCs are gathered near the entrance. After observing the area, the character turns and begins descending along a different path, passing a parked van and a corrugated metal garage structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending street with panoramic views of distant city

events.description: view opens up to reveal extensive futuristic city skyline in the distance
turns right along the elevated path with city views

agents.ego_description: walking down the hillside road with expansive views of the distant city skyline ahead

notable_agents.action: character in skull t-shirt and cap walking up the hill toward camera
white car driving up the winding road

entered.detail: dense crisscrossing network of black utility wires spanning the street
tattered American flag hanging from a building facade
cluster of makeshift buildings with corrugated metal roofs and walls

segments.scene_description: As the character descends, the view opens up to reveal a sweeping vista of the distant futuristic city skyline. The path runs alongside corrugated metal shacks and buildings with an American flag banner visible. Overhead power lines crisscross above the street. The character passes other pedestrians and vehicles while maintaining the descent.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass approaching urban center

events.description: enters the shadow of the overpass structure
emerging from underpass with dense city center visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure toward the distant city center with neon signs visible

notable_agents.action: group of people walking ahead under the overpass toward the city

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure overhead with red support beams and lighting fixtures
illuminated advertising signs and billboards visible in the distance
tall glass and steel towers of the city center becoming more defined

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadow of a large concrete overpass, walking toward the glowing city center in the distance. Neon signs and billboards become visible as the urban density increases. Other pedestrians are seen walking ahead in the same direction, and the futuristic skyscrapers of the city core loom larger as the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the shaded outskirts of a desert settlement toward the glowing heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins under a massive concrete overpass beside a Woodland street sign, moving past a speeding car as the character turns to ascend a hillside path. As the camera emerges into bright sunlight, the scene shifts to a steep climb alongside a dramatic red rock canyon wall dotted with makeshift wooden structures before reaching a graffiti-covered blue apartment building. The perspective then opens up during a descent past corrugated metal shacks and American flag banners, revealing a sweeping vista of the distant city skyline under a web of power lines. Finally, the character re-enters the shadow of another overpass, where the environment transforms into a dense urban landscape of neon signs and towering skyscrapers.
